violations.text: Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2026

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. PIC relocated vegetables. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

The prep unit was observed at 45 degrees. All food in unit was 42-43 degrees. All food is relocated from walk-in daily. PIC adjusted unit at the time of inspection. Unit was adjusted to 39 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025

All foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The ceiling/physical facility in the back storage area was observed with an accumulation of dust and debris. A speed rack with noodles cooling was observed unprotected underneath the area. Food shall be protected to prevent potential contamination of food. Food was relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
